## #13567
- added: 2017-11-14 03:05:43

If gated community, check how guests enter. Should be Hassel free

- added: 2017-11-14 03:03:53

water should not be limited, paying extra is okay. Separate tank is better

- added: 2017-11-14 03:02:18

stay away from all religious places, especially Masjid
